summary: Complete testing of theme toggle functionality and color palette changes. All neon cyan colors successfully replaced with grey/neutral tones. Dark/light mode toggle working perfectly with proper localStorage persistence.
passed_tests: Dark mode colors: background #0c0c0c, text #e0e0e0, accent #a0a0a0 - NO neon cyan
Light mode colors: background #f5f5f5, text #1a1a1a, accent #4a4a4a
Theme toggle button present on auth page with data-testid='auth-theme-toggle'
Theme toggle button present in header with data-testid='theme-toggle-button'
Theme persistence in localStorage using 'maptdp_theme' key
Login flow works: test@maptdp.fr / test123 successfully redirects to home
Header shows username, theme toggle, and logout button after login
All required data-testid attributes present and functional
Mobile responsive design at 390px width - elements scale properly
Glassmorphism effects working with proper backdrop-filter blur
Theme switching works on both auth page and main header
Touch targets appropriately sized for mobile interaction
